blocks.html: Beauty Bomb was a new cosmetic brand that is targeting the low budget segment. It's very cheap and bright — perfect for teens, but we had to convince them that they should turn their attention to Beauty Bomb, which was just launched in Russia.
blocks.text: Beauty Bomb was a new cosmetic brand that is targeting the low budget segment. It's very cheap and bright — perfect for teens, but we had to convince them that they should turn their attention to Beauty Bomb, which was just launched in Russia.

blocks.html:
Teenage girls watch video tutorials of the beauty bloggers and try to do fashionable makeup, but they are too shy to go out with it.

Therefore, in social networks, we have created a platform that unites all these girls and tells them that there are no rules in beauty, and it doesn’t matter what Mom or teachers at school will say about your appearance.


Girls perform various beauty-challenges with Beauty Bomb cosmetics, share their make up, check out diverse and bold results of the other participants, in order to overcome their fear of judgemental comments and become a part of a large beauty gang.
blocks.text: Teenage girls watch video tutorials of the beauty bloggers and try to do fashionable makeup, but they are too shy to go out with it. Therefore, in social networks, we have created a platform that unites all these girls and tells them that there are no rules in beauty, and it doesn’t matter what Mom or teachers at school will say about your appearance. Girls perform various beauty-challenges with Beauty Bomb cosmetics, share their make up, check out diverse and bold results of the other participants, in order to overcome their fear of judgemental comments and become a part of a large beauty gang.

blocks.html: Create a concept of comms platform for highlighting the emerge of TikTok in Cyprus and support the first ever TikTok Cyprus Summit that helps local and global brands start their own business adventure with TikTok.

blocks.html:
The comms platform "Make Tomorrow". This concept combines the ability to show the innovation of TikTok, which has already been proven by a number of projects. As well as show the future opportunities for brands who want to grow their business and determine what tomorrow will be like for millions of people around the planet.

The platform combined an educational event, a promotional campaign about new business opportunities, and personal partner meetings with brands.

blocks.html:
Imagine that you opened a wine bar...in 2020!

I understand, not the best dream fulfillment. But that's exactly what happened with Pipndrop.

And to help the bar survive the quarantine restrictions, we came up with the Pipndrop Cowine-test. The most pleasant alternative to regular tests — without cotton swabs and a painful aftertaste.
blocks.text: Imagine that you opened a wine bar...in 2020! I understand, not the best dream fulfillment. But that's exactly what happened with Pipndrop. And to help the bar survive the quarantine restrictions, we came up with the Pipndrop Cowine-test . The most pleasant alternative to regular tests — without cotton swabs and a painful aftertaste.

blocks.html: The set includes 4 testers with outstanding aromas, convenient packaging and clear instructions: taste the tester, and if you can smell or feel the taste of it — great, you are healthy!
blocks.text: The set includes 4 testers with outstanding aromas, convenient packaging and clear instructions: taste the tester, and if you can smell or feel the taste of it — great, you are healthy!

blocks.html: 5 days before the New Year different lifestyle media such as RBC Style wrote about Cowine-test and 4.5 million people learned about it as a unique New Year's gift!
blocks.text: 5 days before the New Year different lifestyle media such as RBC Style wrote about Cowine-test and 4.5 million people learned about it as a unique New Year's gift!

But who cares?

So I did it.

blocks.html:
But I want you to know which manifesto was in the original idea:

‍

Они говорили, вести дела без офиса — невозможно.

Предугадывать желания каждого клиента — невозможно.

Принимать тысячи звонков разом — невозможно.

Но пока одни говорят, другие делают невозможное вместе с технологиями.

Ростелеком. Технологии возможностей.

blocks.html:
Rostelecom has transformed into a new progressive brand. And this manifesto was created to inspire all employees for this transformation:


В Ростелекоме всё начинается с вызова.

А каждый вызов – это возможность.

Возможность заменить паспорт лицом

Наделить интеллектом наши квартиры

Перенести целое село на век вперед

А затем и всю страну!

В Ростелекоме – 120 000 сотрудников.

И возможности открываются перед каждым.

Возможность однажды найти себя заново

И понять, что не можешь остановиться.

Возможность пойти на работу из школы

Или вовсе перестать ходить в офис.

Возможность за 3 года поменять 6 визиток

И экспериментировать в самой передовой песочнице в стране

Но главное – это возможность быть первым, чем бы вы не занимались.

Создавать будущее, а не ждать, когда оно наступит.

Подумайте, какой вызов – у вас?

В Ростелекоме он станет новой возможностью.

Ростелеком. Технологии возможностей.

А каждый вызов – это возможность. Возможность заменить паспорт лицом Наделить интеллектом наши квартиры Перенести целое село на век вперед А затем и всю страну! В Ростелекоме – 120 000 сотрудников. И возможности открываются перед каждым. Возможность однажды найти себя заново И понять, что не можешь остановиться. Возможность пойти на работу из школы Или вовсе перестать ходить в офис. Возможность за 3 года поменять 6 визиток И экспериментировать в самой передовой песочнице в стране Но главное – это возможность быть первым, чем бы вы не занимались. Создавать будущее, а не ждать, когда оно наступит. Подумайте, какой вызов – у вас? В Ростелекоме он станет новой возможностью. Ростелеком. Технологии возможностей.

blocks.html:
At the beginning of the quarantine in the spring of 2020, Rostelecom organized a hackathon to find new technological solutions that would make our new reality better. This manifesto was created to attract more participants:


Мы закрылись в своих квартирах, но мир остался открытым для нас.

Полным новых возможностей благодаря технологиям.

Мы можем видеться с близкими

Смотреть спектакли

Вести бизнес

И учиться, не выходя из дома.

Да, мы не знаем, каким станет мир завтра.

Но уверены, что всегда найдется человек, готовый сделать его лучше.

И этим человеком можешь стать ты.

Участвуй в VirusHack от Ростелекома, чтобы создать цифровой проект, который откроет новые возможности для миллионов людей.

Ростелеком. Технологии возможностей.

‍

blocks.html: In 2018 Virtus.pro sets a historic achievement: 4 wins in major tournaments for the calendar year. We needed to create a special project about it with a support of the team sponsor Parimatch. The project should consist of 7 materials about the matches.
blocks.text: In 2018 Virtus.pro sets a historic achievement: 4 wins in major tournaments for the calendar year. We needed to create a special project about it with a support of the team sponsor Parimatch. The project should consist of 7 materials about the matches.

blocks.html:
The main page of the special project is framed as a map for Dota 2. Runes containing interesting facts about the team are scattered across the map. Information about the sponsor is highlighted on the map as in-game shop.


The map itself is divided into 7 sections as in the game. Each section is linked to an article about one of the matches. Within a week after the launch, sections were unlocked one by one daily.


When an article is being read, the related map element (towers, Roshan or Throne) is destroyed. Once one's read all 7 articles, the winner’s cup appears on the map. It contains the information about Virtus.pro's upcoming games and a gift from the team’s sponsor.
blocks.text: The main page of the special project is framed as a map for Dota 2. Runes containing interesting facts about the team are scattered across the map. Information about the sponsor is highlighted on the map as in-game shop. The map itself is divided into 7 sections as in the game. Each section is linked to an article about one of the matches. Within a week after the launch, sections were unlocked one by one daily. When an article is being read, the related map element (towers, Roshan or Throne) is destroyed. Once one's read all 7 articles, the winner’s cup appears on the map. It contains the information about Virtus.pro's upcoming games and a gift from the team’s sponsor.

blocks.text: Creating the concept of special project, e.g. - idea - mechanics - sponsor integration
videoservice with an exclusive access to UFC-content

blocks.html:
UFC was not represented well in Russia. Viewers had access to a very limited amount of fights that were shown mainly on TV and always past midnight due to time zones difference.

Wink was the first online video service in Russia to get the exclusive rights for distributing UFC content. We needed to announce it on TV during the fight between Khabib Nurmagomedov and Dustin Porrier.

The main condition was to use only UFC content.
blocks.text: UFC was not represented well in Russia. Viewers had access to a very limited amount of fights that were shown mainly on TV and always past midnight due to time zones difference. Wink was the first online video service in Russia to get the exclusive rights for distributing UFC content. We needed to announce it on TV during the fight between Khabib Nurmagomedov and Dustin Porrier. The main condition was to use only UFC content.

blocks.html:
There are things that you can enjoy endlessly — like pieces of art.
So, for standing out in the ad unit, where all the videos consist of fragments of UFC fights, we focused on the sound and created an atmosphere of classical art venue.
blocks.text: There are things that you can enjoy endlessly — like pieces of art. So, for standing out in the ad unit, where all the videos consist of fragments of UFC fights, we focused on the sound and created an atmosphere of classical art venue.

blocks.html: The video was shown twice in commercial breaks during the night fight. The number of downloads of the app grew by so much that the Wink app entered the TOP of free apps in Russia and became the leader in its category overnight.
